markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games has pushed Grand Theft Auto VI's release to November 19, 2026, following earlier delays from fall 2025 and May 2026, citing the need for additional polish on the Vice City-set title. This extended timeline creates a wide window for numerous cultural, technological, and global developments to occur beforehand, shaping trader focus on outcomes like music album drops, AI advancements such as GPT-6, or geopolitical shifts including a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire. Rockstar's emphasis on quality over speed aligns with historical patterns for major franchises, while Take-Two Interactive's recent earnings guidance reinforces the current date without signals of further slips. Pre-order windows and potential new trailers remain key near-term catalysts that could indirectly influence market activity around timing-related bets.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The recent May 15, 2026 mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s New York rape retrial, following a deadlocked jury on the third attempt at the same charge, has solidified trader consensus around no additional prison time. With the former producer already serving a 16-year California sentence from his 2022 convictions amid ongoing appeals, his advanced age and documented health concerns further reduce the likelihood of meaningful new incarceration from unresolved Manhattan counts. This outcome reflects the challenges of repeated prosecutions in high-profile #MeToo cases, where mixed verdicts and procedural hurdles have limited further sentencing momentum. Upcoming decisions on whether prosecutors pursue a fourth trial could introduce volatility, though current market-implied odds heavily favor limited additional exposure.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Carolina Hurricanes enter the 2026 Stanley Cup Final as consensus favorites due to their dominant 12-1 postseason record, including series wins over the Senators, Flyers, and Canadiens in five games or fewer, while allowing just 21 goals across 13 contests behind strong goaltending from Frederik Andersen. Their regular-season 113-point total and defensive structure have translated into sustained momentum. The Vegas Golden Knights advanced by sweeping the Avalanche in the Western Conference Final after earlier victories over the Mammoth and Ducks, relying on Mitch Marner's playoff-leading production and improved netminding to reach their third Final in franchise history. These paths reflect the current implied probabilities, with the closely contested matchup underscoring both teams' recent form and series experience heading into the best-of-seven.

Their regular-season 113-point total and defensive structure have translated into sustained momentum. The Vegas Golden Knights advanced by sweeping the Avalanche in the Western Conference Final after earlier victories over the Mammoth and Ducks, relying on Mitch Marner's playoff-leading production and improved netminding to reach their third Final in franchise history. These paths reflect the current implied probabilities, with the closely contested matchup underscoring both teams' recent form and series experience heading into the best-of-seven.

markets.question: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NBA Finals based off the rules of the NBA.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NBA.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Oklahoma City Thunder lead 2026 NBA Championship probabilities as the top regular-season team at 64-18 with the league’s best net rating, anchored by Shai Gilgeous-Alexander’s MVP-caliber production and elite defense that carried them to the No. 1 seed and deep Western Conference Finals run. The San Antonio Spurs sit close behind on the strength of their 62-20 record and Victor Wembanyama’s Defensive Player of the Year campaign, where his rim protection and versatility fueled the second-best defensive rating and a competitive West Finals series. The New York Knicks round out the top three after a 53-29 campaign and strong Eastern Conference playoff advancement, highlighted by balanced scoring, improved coaching under Mike Brown, and consistent defensive execution that positions them as the primary Eastern threat in the Finals matchup.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping maintains firm control over the Chinese Communist Party and central military commission through ongoing personnel adjustments and anti-corruption campaigns that have centralized authority among loyalists. Recent military leadership changes and civilian expulsions ahead of the 2026 Two Sessions reinforced this pattern without evidence of elite opposition or institutional challenges. No successor has been elevated to key posts, and analysts view the 21st Party Congress in 2027 as likely to extend his role rather than trigger transition. High-profile diplomatic activity, including 2026 summits projecting policy continuity on issues like Taiwan, further signals stability through the end of the resolution window. Traders therefore price removal before 2027 as a low-probability outcome absent unforeseen health or factional developments.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom leads the fragmented 2028 Democratic presidential nomination field at 23.4% on Polymarket, buoyed by his high national profile as California governor, term-limited status freeing him for a bid, and recent steps including hiring a former federal regulator to address AI concerns while courting donors and building visibility ahead of the 2026 midterms. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trails at 9.2% amid her national tour and Southern outreach emphasizing progressive priorities, while Kamala Harris sits at 8.1% drawing on prior national experience. The wide spread across dozens of outcomes, including senators like Jon Ossoff and governors like Josh Shapiro, reflects an open race with no declared candidates and heavy reliance on name recognition and early positioning in key voting blocs such as Black voters in the South. Recent polling shows shifting support among top names like Pete Buttigieg, underscoring how post-midterm endorsements, fundraising, and primary dynamics could consolidate backing before formal announcements.
